Class DRMultiAxisPlot

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.chart.plot.AbstractBasePlot
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.chart.plot.DRAxisPlot
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.chart.plot.DRMultiAxisPlot
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIAxisPlot, DRIBasePlot, DRIMultiAxisPlot, DRIPlot, Serializable
public class DRMultiAxisPlot extends DRAxisPlot implements DRIMultiAxisPlot
